raw_consumer_statement:
I was charged an annual fee by American Express just before my statement closed. I downgraded the card a few days later, and the fee was reversed. However, the minimum payment due still includes the annual fee even though I no longer owe it. 

I requested Amex adjust the minimum due or reissue the statement to reflect the reversal, but they refused, stating its not possible, even though I know other customers have had minimum payments adjusted in similar cases.

Im being told to pay a minimum amount that includes a charge I dont owe. This is misleading.
